name: claude-abap-skills
description: Opinionated skill library for Claude Code targeting modern ABAP development — BTP ABAP Environment and S/4HANA 2023+ in the ABAP Cloud development model. Two layers: Clean ABAP universal rules + ABAP Cloud / RAP overlay (clean core, RAP behavior design, CDS layering, ATC remediation). Assumes the official SAP ABAP MCP Server (SAPSE.adt-vscode) provides system access.

metadata.description: 5 ABAP skills across 2 plugins. Targets BTP ABAP Environment and S/4HANA 2023+ in ABAP Cloud development model. Not for ECC, pre-2023 on-prem, or classic ABAP.

plugins.name: clean-abap
plugins.description: Universal Clean ABAP rules (auto-loaded) plus two skills: review and refactor. Targets modern ABAP only — BTP ABAP Environment or S/4HANA 2023+ in the ABAP Cloud development model.

plugins.name: abap-cloud-rap
plugins.description: ABAP Cloud / RAP overlay (auto-loaded rules) plus three skills: rap-bo-design (build a full RAP BO via the official SAP ADT MCP generators), atc-remediation (walk ATC findings methodically), clean-core-check (audit clean core compliance). Best paired with the clean-abap plugin. Targets BTP ABAP Environment and S/4HANA 2023+ in the ABAP Cloud development model.
